description: A clean, designed graphic styled as a screenshot/share card of a Daily Wire article header. White background. At top center is the masthead 'THE DAILY WIRE' in the publication's distinctive thin-serif caps with horizontal rules flanking the small word 'THE'. A thin grey divider line runs beneath. Below at left a red eyebrow/kicker reads 'EXCLUSIVE' in spaced caps. The main headline in large black sans-serif reads: 'EXCLUSIVE: U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services Will Only Recognize Two Genders'. A bold black sub-headline/dek follows: 'The decision will impact green cards and employment authorization documents.' There are no photos, seals, or illustrations — it is purely a typographic article-header card amplifying favorable conservative-press coverage of a USCIS policy. Propaganda technique: laundering an administration policy announcement through a friendly outlet's headline to signal a culture-war 'two genders' stance on immigration documents. Target audience: conservative supporters and the general public; the tweet frames it as protecting children and women.
notable_text: THE DAILY WIRE; EXCLUSIVE: U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services Will Only Recognize Two Genders; The decision will impact green cards and employment authorization documents.
